titleStmt.title: SII 33.97: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 97. (A.R. No. 19 of 1948.) Pedda Yekkalūru, Tadpatri Taluk, Anantapur District.

summary.p: Broken slab lying near the Chennakēśava temple.

This is dated Śaka 1436, Yuva, Māgha ba. 14, Thursday. The cyclic and Śaka years do not tally. If the cyclic year is taken as correct to be the details would correspond to 1516 A.D., January 31, Thursday f.d.t. °74.

Records the grant of land in the village Peda Yakalūru for construction of Raṅgamaṇḍapam and conducting food offerings to the god Mūlasthāna Mallikhārjuna by Peda Tirumalayya, son of Pradhāni Sōmarasayya for the merit of Sāḷuva Timmarasayya, the king's minister. The village which was situated in (the division of) Pennabaḍi included in the Jagatāpi-Gutti-sīma was a nāyaṁkara assigned by the minister to the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaścaṁdra śiraścuṁbi cāruceṁdramarī
cayētrailōka nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . śubhamastu svastiśrī ja
yādbhudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa
ṁbulu 1436 Agunēṭi yuva saṁvatsa
ra māgha ba 14 guruvārāna śrīmaṁnmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapra
tāpa śrīvīrakriṣṇadēvarāya mahārāya
lu pṛthivīrājyamu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu
Ā rāyala pradhāni śrīmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra mēdini mīsara kaṭhāri sāḷuva dharaṇī va
rāhacina vāṁkaṁḍena sāḷuva tiṁmmarusa
yya gāriki rāyalu nāyaṁkarānaku bāliṁci
na jagatāpi guttisīmalōni pennabaḍini tama
pradhāni so(ti)marusayya koḍuku pedatiru
malayya gāriki nāyaṁkaranaku jelle peda
yakalūri grāmānannu mūlastānamaina
mallikhārjunadēvuniki sāḷuvatiṁma
rusayya gāriki puṁṇyaṁgānu dēvu
niki raṁga maṁḍḍapamunnu gaṭiṁci
rvānaṁjele mānaṁ cellagānu dēvuni nai
vēdyanaku yiccinadi yī tathātithi puṁṇya
kālamaṁdu brāṁhala kāluvalōnape
rumāḷa maḍiki vuttarabhāgamaṁduma
ḍi 92 yidumu maḍini gaḍapā sa
hiraṁṇyadaka dāna dhārāpūrvakaṁgā
sadyapparicce ma tānu
masēpu mā
yaṁku
tiṁmarusayyagāriki puṁṇya
gānu dhāravosiyistimigāna Ācaṁdra
rkastāyigānu śrīmahādēvuḍanupū
jiṁcunu . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pa
ratānupālanaṁ paradattānuhāreṇa
svadattāṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavet . svadatāṁpara
dattāṁ vā yō hareti vasuṁdharāṁ sa
ṣṭirvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kri
ki . yīdharmānaku yavvaru tappinānu
kāsilōnu gōhatyabrāhāṇahatya
nu pitṛvadhalanu sēsina pāpāna bo
varavuduru . ceṁnnakēśavadēvuni naivē
dyanaku brāṁhāla kāluvalōnu maḍi 92
toṭa 90 ḍursadhāravosiyistimi yī
rdhamaku yavvaru dappinānu braṁhatyapāpā
na pōduru maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 33.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
